description:
“ ICICI Lombard Criti Shield Plus ” is a comprehensively designed product which helps you in meeting your obligations at the time of major exigencies of life such as any major/minor illnesses or in case you undergo any of the major surgeries covered under the Policy.

In this video , we have discussed various features of ICICI Lombard Criti Shield Plus Plan & also calculated premiums for better understanding. 

To buy insurance policies, click here - https://hareepatti.com/contact-us/


 ICICI Lombard Criti Shield Plus Brochure :  https://www.irdai.gov.in/ADMINCMS/cms/Uploadedfiles/HealthProducts/2021-22/ICIHLIP22131V012122.pdf

*TIME STAMPS*
0:00  Introduction of Criti Shield Plus
2:03  Eligibility Criteria of Criti Shield Plus
2:29  Features of ICICI Lombard Criti Shield Plus
4:57  List of critical illness in ICICI Lombard Criti Shield Plus
5:56  Exclusions in  ICICI Lombard Criti Shield Plus
7:16  Premium calculation of  ICICI Lombard Criti Shield Plus
8:06  Claim Process of  ICICI Lombard Criti Shield Plus

Do SUBSCRIBE to our Youtube Channel for more such informative videos.

I've shortlisted this plan and SBI Life Poorna Suraksha.
Seeking final suggestion.
